samples.text: If it rains on the field, then the ground becomes wet. It rains on the field. Does it follow that the ground becomes wet?
Whenever it rains on the field, the ground becomes wet as a result. In this case it rains on the field. Can we conclude that the ground becomes wet?
If rain falls on the field, then the ground gets soaked. Rain falls on the field. Does it follow that the ground gets soaked?
The condition for 'the ground becomes wet' is met because it rains on the field. Does it follow that the ground becomes wet?
If it rains on the field, then the ground becomes wet. It rains on the field. Someone left the door open earlier. Does it follow that the ground becomes wet?
